enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief Sunday vlog update from Boulder on February 28, 2016, describing progress on a project he likens to a 'bombing campaign' (likely cleaning or organizing), mentioning he got a late start after staying up late, smoked wax cannabis, and plans for upcoming days including a dermatology appointment in Denver and talking with his brother. He also mentions listening to a 'History of America' audiobook/podcast.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: doesn't like it because he doesn't think as clearly, but keeps working through it
really enjoying it, finds it very good

transcript.text: Hello, new movie recording. This is Sunday, February 28th, 2016, living in Boulder. So, let me show you what I did yesterday first off.
Okay, so here's what I did yesterday. As you can see, I conquered this whole area. I like to liken this to a bombing campaign, just where I'm knocking out entire blocks at a time in one day.

But it's not perfect. I just discovered this part here. There needs to be an alley here, and the blocks actually go this way. And then, yeah, this one had too many, so it's some touch-ups I have to do. But yeah, I'll do the touch-ups, and then I'll do the touch-ups on this, fix this part, and then see if I can fill this part in today. And it's probably good for the day.
I got off to kind of a late start, because I was up really late last night, and then slept in today. And then I just spent a whole time, and I'll talk about that in a second.
So I got up early, I mean, kind of late, and then spent a lot of time. I'm out of weed. My roommate gave me some weed yesterday, but I smoked it all up. So all I have is wax.
So I put a big old chunk of wax in my pipe, in my pen, and I've just been hopping on that. But it takes forever to get high. When you get high, you're like, whoa. You're like retarded high.
I don't like being high on the concentrates. I don't think quite as well. But I mean, I'm high, and I keep working, so.
But yeah, that's what I'm going to do today. Worked yesterday. Somebody told me that my V-log from yesterday was like the same V-log as the day before.
So, and the computer, YouTube didn't catch that, because I had it spliced, you know, another screen capture video.
So, I'm going to fix that by just making sure all my videos are deleted before I upload another video.
So, and what I did yesterday, I cleaned Jeff Lowe's windows yesterday.
And then I'm going to work next Friday.
But tomorrow I go into the dermatology in Denver, and they're going to take my stitches out and have agandres at this.
And, um, yeah, I think I'm going to buy some weed pretty soon, but I think I'll run out of my shatter on wax first.
So I guess I'll be, I'll kind of be tired until then, but I'll be licking my butt off on this.
So, uh, that's about all I have to say.
Bombing campaign continuing.
Okay, who's, uh, I'm listening to History of America by the Beards.
It's really good, really good, man.
But, um, I'm totally, I'm like, ooh, I can't wait until the third when I get my card.
And then I'm going to fill up my other, my other, you know, cell phone.
So, talk about that when I do that.
Oh, yeah, and I'll see if I can upload from YouTube, I mean, from Dreamweaver.
But I might need, I might want to call tech support and have them help me figure it out.
I don't know why I'm uploading a status uploading.
So, I guess I can go into my server, make sure it's going to the right place.
Okay, keep that out.
